function.name: inspect_chart
function.description: Read one or more charts. Returns each chart's encodings, a sample of its data, and the transformation code that created it so you can reason about what it shows (use execute_python_script on the backing table for the full data). A rendered PNG is included only when one is available.

chart_ids.description: List of chart IDs from [AVAILABLE CHARTS] to inspect.

function.name: write_report
function.description: Deliver a Markdown report and end the run. `report` is the full report text (embed charts with ![caption](chart://chart_id)).

report.description: The full Markdown report text. Embed charts with ![caption](chart://chart_id) referencing IDs from [AVAILABLE CHARTS].
